## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link the issue: Fixes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue, or the description explains the change and why.
- [ ] `make test-int` passes (Docker running first — see [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md)).
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` is clean.
- [ ] Docs (manual / README) updated if behavior changed.

---

🤖 **AI-assisted PRs are welcome — that's the whole point.** Human or agent, doesn't matter,
as long as it's correct, tested, and reviewable.
